headline: 2 hours of notes, done in 2 minutes
primary_text:
2 hours. That's how much time the average therapist spends on documentation after their last patient leaves.

JotPsych cuts that to under 15 minutes. Our AI listens to your sessions and generates complete, clinical-quality notes automatically—treatment plans, progress notes, intake assessments.

Reclaim your evenings. End the after-hours grind. Join 1,200+ clinicians who leave work on time now.

Start your free trial today.
